name: Blacksmith OSS Program
description: Free high-performance GitHub Actions runners for open source projects. Blacksmith provides 2x faster hardware and 4x faster cache downloads, currently supporting projects like Celery, Ladybird, Zen, and Limbo.

perks.title: Free CI Minutes
perks.description: Free access to Blacksmith's high-performance GitHub Actions runners for qualifying open source projects.

perks.title: 2x Faster Hardware
perks.description: Runners with 2x faster hardware compared to GitHub's default runners, cutting CI runtime in half.

perks.title: 4x Faster Cache Downloads
perks.description: Significantly faster cache downloads for quicker builds and shorter feedback loops.

applicationProcess: Apply through the OSS Program section on the Blacksmith pricing page.
Applications are reviewed by the Blacksmith team.
